title: Volkswagen plans to cut 15% of its workforce and close four German plants, report says
summary_full: Auto giant Volkswagen is reportedly planning to cut 100,000 jobs and end production at four German plants over the coming years.
summary_public: Auto giant Volkswagen is reportedly planning to cut 100,000 jobs and end production at four German plants over the coming years.
